Off Calendar Jan-06-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Plaintiff's application for right to attach order and writ of attachment:
Ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005 requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing. The motion was filed on December 16, 2005. (610/CHAN)
